reviews.comment:
Típica estación ACA. Si van a las 14 hs toca esperar el "cambio de guardia"

(Translated by Google)
Typical ACA station. If you go at 2 PM you have to wait for the "changing of the guard".
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcW92Z3p3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Volví después de muchos meses porque un playero me faltó el respeto. En esa oportunidad hasta hablé con el jefe de estación. Me invitó a darles otra oportunidad y a probar las medialunas del buffet. Hoy volví, no tienen nafta súper. UN ÉXITO!!!

(Translated by Google)
I returned after many months because a gas station attendant disrespected me. That time I even spoke with the station manager. He invited me to give them another chance and to try the croissants at the buffet. I went back today; they don't have premium gasoline. A SUCCESS!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNteXJMYmhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños impecablemente limpios. Si este servicio esta bien el resto es muy bueno, comenzando por la atencion

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were impeccably clean. If this service is good, everything else is very good, starting with the customer service.
